mapper.sql: id , entrustment_no, report_code, type, state, create_date, remark, use_date
mapper.insert: insert into test_reserve_code (id, entrustment_no, report_code, type, state, create_date, remark, use_date) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entrustmentNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reportCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into test_reserve_code
id,
entrustment_no,
report_code,
type,
state,
create_date,
remark,
use_date,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{entrustmentNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{reportCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{useDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update test_reserve_code
entrustment_no = #{entrustmentNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
report_code = #{reportCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_date = #{createDate,jdbcType=DATE},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
use_date = #{useDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update test_reserve_code set entrustment_no = #{entrustmentNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, report_code = #{reportCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_date = #{createDate,jdbcType=DATE}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, use_date = #{useDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT id VALUE, entrustment_no label FROM test_entrusted_info WHERE state NOT IN ( 144, 200 )
AND entrustment_no LIKE concat(concat('%',#{entrustmentNo}),'%')
ORDER BY entrustment_no DESC

SELECT count(1) size FROM ( SELECT report_code FROM test_report_record UNION ALL SELECT report_code FROM test_report_record_mid UNION ALL SELECT report_code FROM test_reserve_code ) t1 WHERE t1.report_code = #{code}
mapper.insert:
insert into test_reserve_code (id, entrustment_no, report_code, type, state, create_date, remark, use_date) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.entrustmentNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.reportCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.state,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.useDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
